prompt:
Use case: social ad shot 3 of 6
Primary request: Operational workflow moment: incident reported, investigation assigned, action tracked, evidence attached, activity timeline updated in one continuous product flow.
Scene/background: software workflow close-up
Subject: tabbed incident workspace and timeline
Action: beat 1: incident card opens; beat 2: investigation and action states update; beat 3: attachment and timeline checkmark appears
Camera: lateral glide across panels
Lighting/mood: neutral studio screen glow
Color palette: slate, white, teal, amber
Style/format: high-clarity SaaS commercial
Text (verbatim): "From report to resolution."
Constraints: all-ages safe, no real people, no logos, no copyrighted characters
